---
title: "Targetted Viromics"
author:
  "Wonderful Choga"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---
  
## Slides

[link_to_slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1SX3lxRjaeHUX7yw0AFJB7KZTEl7lEIB7mYxvWiaNGAk/edit?usp=sharing)

```{=html}

<iframe src="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/e/2PACX-1vSlOmu_TyLBEKnkDAcWclkrfupPyACk-kPOseIDL3mBgUO_hWgNjTqcWP2FmQnF6W9xuAl5no7Q6hxH/embed?start=false&loop=false&delayms=3000"  frameborder="0" width="960" height="569" allowfullscreen="true" mozallowfullscreen="true" webkitallowfullscreen="true"></iframe>

```


## Exercises

### Exercise 1
[link to exercise 1](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1SnBKeEJ9a5dDWepSVRiqNuYerT5FULHIXViZd4iOeUk/edit?usp=sharing)

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/e/2PACX-1vRZi6b92QPLM27lV6omcFV3GRkZlM8OC11aQgjmNKbVRbw3DHiZkDton3ZPcffG776vvqZH0Ye3_2Xq/embed?start=false&loop=false&delayms=3000" frameborder="0" width="960" height="569" allowfullscreen="true" mozallowfullscreen="true" webkitallowfullscreen="true"></iframe>
```

### Exercise 2


[link to exercise 2](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1ZpwtAWCdtTEQ9wRnR3GgOlRBdDFYkGUTcXzg2BhEyyY/edit?usp=sharing)

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/e/2PACX-1vR74Jy9OCaPvTd793oWA4fVefRVUhEbn2rWR6AZjAoNIrDPzb6E3K1b7C74dD_XOJLpMxr9bNQ_KO66/embed?start=false&loop=false&delayms=3000" frameborder="0" width="960" height="569" allowfullscreen="true" mozallowfullscreen="true" webkitallowfullscreen="true"></iframe>
```

### Exercise 3

[link to exercise 3](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1zjOntZn6Xi5-jqtryQvQr-qrNzW4ewwhs8K2yZ9WulM/edit?usp=sharing)

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/e/2PACX-1vRGBEzKYZHSd8f7vAc4uI0yq-OkI6imv5Mb71pGKimKGf0vGAOKfbqInCWTX3hnWZMuDq3swNVQv-q6/embed?start=false&loop=false&delayms=3000"  frameborder="0" width="960" height="569" allowfullscreen="true" mozallowfullscreen="true" webkitallowfullscreen="true"></iframe>
```
